MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
NO APPEARANCE MADE BY THE DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES, AMERICA CALIFORNIA BANK and MARGARET FU
VLADIE P. VILTMAN, ESQ.(LAW OFFICES OF MATTANIAH EYTAN), (415)399-1000, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, CINDY BAO

THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED.
